scripts.dev: export DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" CLEAR_NEXT_CACHE=1; bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && node scripts/generate-prisma-clean.mjs && node scripts/assert-prisma-models.mjs && next dev
scripts.start: PORT=${PORT:-3000} BIND_HOST=${BIND_HOST:-0.0.0.0}; if [ -f .next/standalone/server.js ]; then HOSTNAME=$BIND_HOST PORT=$PORT bun .next/standalone/server.js; else next start -p $PORT -H $BIND_HOST; fi
scripts.qa:data-integrity: TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bun scripts/qa-data-integrity.mjs
scripts.qa:concurrency: TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bun scripts/qa-concurrency.mjs
scripts.qa:repair-requests: TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bun scripts/qa-repair-request-numbers.mjs
scripts.qa:all: bun run qa:data-integrity && bun run qa:concurrency && bun run qa:perf
scripts.seed: TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bun run prisma/seed.ts
scripts.seed:base: TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bun run prisma/seed-base.ts
scripts.seed:demo: TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bun run prisma/seed.ts
scripts.seed:commercial: TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bunx prisma generate && TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db}" bun run prisma/seed-commercial.ts
scripts.test:unit: ALLOW_SQLITE_PRODUCTION=1 TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="file:$(pwd)/prisma/test.db" bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && ALLOW_SQLITE_PRODUCTION=1 TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="file:$(pwd)/prisma/test.db" bun test tests/unit --timeout 30000
scripts.test:setup: ALLOW_SQLITE_PRODUCTION=1 TURSO_DATABASE_URL= TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN= DATABASE_URL="file:$(pwd)/prisma/test.db" bunx prisma db push --schema ../../../prisma/schema.prisma --skip-generate
